'''Gelmeat''' was a sweet food product found throughout the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], and was a favorite of [[Ben Skywalker]]'s. He also fed some to the [[Gorog]] [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] he befriended on [[Qoribu]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{Mo}}
